issues.description: Card has effect text but effects[] is empty. Must define trigger, condition, and action.
[Your Turn] in text requires duration:"DuringYourTurn", not Permanent or EndOfTurn

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] When your opponent activates [Blocker] or an Event, if your Leader has the {East Blue} type, you may trash 4 cards from the top of your deck.
